# Documentation templates

These templates define the required section order for new documents.
Copy the relevant template into its target directory, replace every placeholder, and delete sections that genuinely do not apply.

- [Index and subsystem landing page](index.md)
- [User guide](user-guide.md)
- [Architecture](architecture.md)
- [Specification](spec.md)
- [Reference](reference.md)
- [Development guide](development.md)
- [Decision](decision.md)
- [RFC](rfc.md)

Templates are scaffolding and are excluded from document metadata and reachability checks.
